experiment.name: skill_vs_baseline_math
experiment.description: SkillConfig structured solver vs no-prompt baseline on math/logic tasks

diff.description: SkillConfig (structured solver) vs None (no system prompt)

system_prompt.name: structured_solver
system_prompt.description: Step-by-step problem solver with concise output
system_prompt.system_prompt: You are a precise problem solver. Show your reasoning in numbered steps, then give a final answer on the last line prefixed with 'Answer:'. Be concise — no filler words.

tasks: A train travels 120 km in 1.5 hours. What is its average speed in km/h?
If a rectangle has perimeter 36cm and width 6cm, what is its area?
Alice has twice as many apples as Bob. Together they have 18 apples. How many does Alice have?
